calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
10:02a.m. No appearances in Open court. The Court's tentative ruling is hearing required. Plaintiff/Judgment creditor gave notice of non appearance. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC AS SERVICER FOR ("ASF") WILMINGTON TRUST, N.A., AS ISSUER LOAN TRUSTEE FOR ONEMAIN FINANCIAL ISSUANCE TRUST 2020-1 HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Taken Under Submission. ***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Continued To Apr-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC AS SERVICER FOR ("ASF") WILMINGTON TRUST, N.A., AS ISSUER LOAN TRUSTEE FOR ONEMAIN FINANCIAL ISSUANCE TRUST 2020-1 HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Continued on court's own motion to April 30, 2026.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
